meta.title: Yuki Sasai | AI Product Engineer
meta.description: Engineer with 50+ web projects, now expanding into AI-powered product development.

hero.lead: From web development to AI-powered products.
hero.leadSub: 5+ years and 50+ websites delivered. Now building with AI and modern web technologies.

about.title: Design, build, ship.
body: For the past five years, I have been working in web development and have contributed to more than 50 website projects.
My experience includes corporate websites, landing pages, recruitment websites, and e-commerce sites, primarily built with WordPress.
Currently, I'm expanding my expertise into Next.js, TypeScript, system design, Python, and AI-powered product development.
My goal is to combine my practical web development experience with modern AI technologies to build products that solve real business problems.

projects.title: Professional Projects
projects.description: End-to-end projects — from identifying challenges to design, development, and launch.

livvy.name: Livvy
livvy.overview: Planning, design, and development of a corporate website reflecting the brand identity. Implemented responsive design and SEO optimization.
livvy.challenge: The client needed a website that accurately communicates their brand appeal and provides a great user experience.
livvy.solution: Built a responsive WordPress site with SEO best practices, ensuring clear messaging and accessibility across all devices.

nagase.name: Nagase
nagase.overview: Planning, design, and development of a corporate website to communicate company information and services.
nagase.challenge: A professional website was needed to effectively convey the company's credibility and service strengths.
nagase.solution: Developed with WordPress, implementing clean layouts, responsive design, and SEO optimization.

gym-landing-page.name: Gym Landing Page
gym-landing-page.overview: UI design and front-end development of a landing page for gym customer acquisition.
gym-landing-page.challenge: An engaging page design was needed to effectively convert visitors into gym members.
gym-landing-page.solution: Designed with a mobile-first approach, implementing clear CTAs and a compelling, conversion-focused layout.

u2-official-store.name: U2 Official Store
u2-official-store.overview: Store setup, UI design, and product management for an official online store.
u2-official-store.challenge: An e-commerce site was needed that expresses the brand identity while providing a smooth shopping experience.
u2-official-store.solution: Built on Shopify with brand-aligned UI customization and organized product catalog management.

projectsPage.title: All Projects
projectsPage.description: A complete list of projects I've worked on.

systemDesign.title: System Design
systemDesign.description: I'm learning system design to build products that are scalable, maintainable, and secure.

writing.title: Writing & Learning
writing.description: I write about Next.js, TypeScript, system design, and AI on Zenn.

contact.title: Let's build something together.
contact.body: Web development, AI product development, and workflow automation — feel free to reach out.

contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.description: Web development, AI product development, and workflow automation — feel free to reach out.
